title: Day 3 — ComfyUI Setup and Quiz App Dev
notes: Spent the day setting up ComfyUI with FP32 precision and developing quizwhiz, a Node.js quiz application. Researched ComfyUI issues and procedural terrain generation while monitoring heavy memory usage from Python and Node processes.
tasks: Developed quizwhiz using npm run dev and tested quiz questions in browser
Researched ComfyUI GitHub issues and ProceduralTerrains repository for reference

title: Day 2 — ChronoVerse planning and quizwhiz dev
notes: Spent most of the day planning the ChronoVerse game concept in Antigravity and Claude, discussing design direction. Also ran the quizwhiz Next.js dev server and researched Baamboozle's game platform in the browser.
tasks: Planned ChronoVerse: The Time Architect game concept in Antigravity
Discussed design approach for ChronoVerse with Claude
Ran quizwhiz Next.js dev server (npm run dev)
Researched Baamboozle platform and riddles in browser

title: Day 1 — Portfolio config and Git push
notes: Worked on personal portfolio site jeet.dev, editing the profile.js configuration file to update identity settings. Pushed changes via git and used Docker for local development. Also explored Web3Forms integration.
tasks: Edited profile.js configuration for portfolio site identity settings
Pushed portfolio changes via git to jeet-v4 repository
Tested portfolio locally using Docker containers
Researched Web3Forms integration for forms handling
